extract: Keldeo (Japanese: ケルディオ Keldeo) is a dual-type Water/Fighting Mythical Pokémon introduced in Generation V. While it is not known to evolve into or from any Pokémon, Keldeo has a second form. When it knows the move Secret Sword, it changes from its original form, Ordinary Form, to its Resolute Form. (Specifics may differ in past games. Refer to Game data→Form data for these details.) Keldeo was leaked in the March 2012 issue of CoroCoro magazine on February 13, 2012, and it was officially revealed on February 15, 2012. Keldeo's Resolute Form was officially revealed in the July 2012 issue of CoroCoro on June 13, 2012, and introduced in Pokémon Black 2 and White 2. Along with Cobalion, Terrakion, and Virizion, Keldeo is a member of the Swords of Justice. In the movie Kyurem VS. The Sword of Justice, they are also associated with Kyurem.
